intent: Demonstrate that blindly redispatching an indeterminate provider attempt violates the ambiguity boundary.
positive_scenarios: observe that dispatch is enabled in the initial indeterminate state whose recorded dispatch count is already one
forbidden_scenarios: repair the mutant or weaken NoBlindReplay during evaluation
anti_vacuity_obligations: Dispatch is enabled in the initial indeterminate state.
Current-state enabledness refutes the property before a replay transition is taken.

change_control.rule: Changing intent, properties, source bytes, witness shape, or oracle requires a new suite version.
